zh.lifeSummary: Mabel d'Aungeuile是Robert D'Aungeuile和Mrs. Robert D'Angerville的女兒，於1220年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利安格維爾-貝爾爾。她和William Bellers至少有1個兒子。她去世在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷。

nameMeanings.name: Mabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

en.lifeSummary: Mabel d'Aungeuile was born in 1220, in Angerville-Bailleul, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France as the daughter of Robert D'Aungeuile and Mrs. Robert D'Angerville. She had at least 1 son with William Bellers. She died in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Mabel d'Aungeuile est née en 1220, à Angerville-Bailleul, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, fille de Robert D'Aungeuile et Mrs. Robert D'Angerville. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec William Bellers. Elle est décédée à Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hatte mit William Bellers mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Mabel d'Aungeuileは1220年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメアンジャーヴィレ-ベイレウルでRobert D'AungeuileとMrs. Robert D'Angervilleの娘として生まれた。彼女はWilliam Bellersとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女はイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mabel d'Aungeuile(은)는 1220년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 앤그르비레-베이레우에서 Robert D'Aungeuile(와)과 Mrs. Robert D'Angerville의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 William Bellers(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Mabel d'Aungeuile родилась в 1220 г. в местности ангирвилле-беиллеул, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция. Её родителей звали Robert D'Aungeuile и Mrs. Robert D'Angerville. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от William Bellers. Она умерла в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
